draft_text.body:
Inquiry summary: Hello, we need 1000 pcs PU sunglasses cases for US shipment. Please confirm quote and lead time.

Requested quantity: 1000 pcs

Destination: United States

Product references:
- Customizable PU Leather Portable Sunglasses Case New Design Logo Plug-in Closure Travel Anti-scratch Eyeglasses Soft Case | description available

Price note: There is no verified live pricing field available, so the system cannot generate a firm quote automatically.

Lead time note: There is no verified lead-time data source, so the system cannot commit a delivery schedule automatically.
draft_text.closing: Please confirm the following items before sending a formal reply: final_quote, lead_time.
